strengths: Completed all six transfers successfully without dropping any objects
Maintained good instrument control throughout the task
Achieved a solid time of 53.2 seconds with no penalties
weaknesses: Time performance is below intermediate benchmark expectations
Some inefficient instrument movements and repositioning observed
Could improve transfer sequence planning for better flow

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the complete task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing direct paths between pegs

drills.name: Nondominant pickup rehearsal
drills.description: Practice first-hand pickups using the nondominant hand only to improve bilateral coordination

progression_note: Good technical execution with room for speed improvement. Focus on converting your consistent completion into faster, more efficient movement patterns to reach the intermediate benchmark of under 48 seconds.
